Short summary: Plain transformer backbone for any-view geometry using a minimal depth + ray target.
Key signal: Strong pose and geometry gains over VGGT in the paper's benchmark.

Short summary: Monocular geometry model that decouples relative geometry from global metric scale and sharpens real-data supervision.
Key signal: Strong metric scale and detail balance for single-image settings.

Short summary: Large feed-forward transformer that predicts multiple 3D outputs from one to hundreds of views.
Key signal: Most complete shared 3D feature story across cameras, depth, points, and tracks.
